spec_match.rationale: The demo now compares legacy fitting techniques against the current CSS Text 4 text-fit syntax using grow and shrink values.

interactive.rationale: Each migration card has an Old/New toggle, a width slider, live rendered output, and code that updates with the selected path.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept lede and parent card describe the same migration comparison between old techniques and native text-fit behavior.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers grow-only, shrink-only, JavaScript timing, transform distortion, and unsupported-browser fallback behavior.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes the required ChromeStatus feature link plus the CSS Text 4 text-fit reference.

design_system.rationale: Local styles use the shared CSS variables, set button background and text colors together, and avoid raw color values.

summary: The migration diff now clears the previous major reference gap, uses the current text-fit grow/shrink syntax, and remains interactive with labelled fallback previews when native support is unavailable.
